mapper.select: SELECT id, location_id, water_level, temperature, humidity, measured_at FROM sensor_logs WHERE location_id = #{locationId} ORDER BY measured_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT DISTINCT ON (location_id) id, location_id, water_level, temperature, humidity, measured_at FROM sensor_logs ORDER BY location_id, measured_at DESC
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM locations WHERE id = #{id})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO locations (id, name) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}) ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT l.id::numeric as locationId, l.name as name, -- 💡 l.latitude가 문자열일 경우를 대비해 ::numeric 으로 강제 숫자 변환 후 비교! CASE WHEN l.latitude::numeric = 0.0 THEN 37.5735 ELSE l.latitude::numeric END as latitude, CASE WHEN l.longitude::numeric = 0.0 THEN 126.9782 ELSE l.longitude::numeric END as longitude, COALESCE(s.water_level, 0) as waterLevel FROM locations l LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT ON (location_id) location_id, water_level FROM sensor_logs ORDER BY location_id, measured_at DESC ) s ON l.id::numeric = s.location_id::numeric
SELECT id as locationId, name FROM locations
